creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
Ports are all up to date using portsnap.

I get the following error when building mail/courier-imap:


===>  Applying distribution patches for courier-imap-4.13,2
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to imapd-ssl.rc.in.rej
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to imapd.rc.in.rej
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to pop3d-ssl.rc.in.rej
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to pop3d.rc.in.rej
*** Error code 4

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier-imap.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/courier-imap.
example:/usr/ports/mail/courier-imap #

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/courier-imap && make clean && make
